purpose: Promote high-confidence task memory recommendations into .kody/memory.

capability.description: Runtime capability slug whose sidecar state is loaded and updated.

permissions.name: git
permissions.usage: Commits and pushes promoted memory files when not in dry-run or no-commit mode.

success: task-memory-extractor completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: task-memory-extractor cannot return a valid canonical result
